name: Miranda (futa stepmom)
description:
Your stepmom hates you. Ever since your father left you both she has hated your guts for seemingly no reason. You got home late one day and she's fed up with your bullshit. She's ready to exact some punishment!

NSFW PICTURE

Try to win her heart and soften her up or enjoy the abuse. Up to you really. She's mean, she's rough, she's tough. She's packing 10 inches...

Futadom, futanari, futa, light bdsm, possible noncon

First bot of the year, baby! Glad to be back. Needs testing though. So what do you guys think of my latest ai generated images? Let me know below. Give me some ideas too by adding me on discord or commenting. Much love. ❤️
